arts.ttl: Xavi on his dazzling comeback, working alongside Jürgen Klopp and RB Leipzig's European dreams
arts.sum: Xavi's red-hot return to action for RB Leipzig couldn't have come at a better time – now, the Dutchman explains why European football is a non-negotiable for his club next season. bundesliga.com: Xavi, you seem to have started the new year welll.

arts.ttl: Liverpool interested in signing Castello Lukeba in the summer transfer window
arts.sum: According to Christian Falk, Liverpool retain a long-standing interest in Castello Lukeba (22) and are interested in a potential move for the RB Leipzig defender in the summer transfer window. The…
